questions.question: Where is the library located?
questions.answer: The library is located in the middle of the campus.

questions.question: Where is the cafeteria?
questions.answer: Starbees is located below CNMX, beside gym.

questions.question: What is FCI?
questions.answer: FCI is the Faculty of Computing and Informatics, which offers courses in computer science, cybersecurity, data science, game developer, and software engineering.

questions.question: Where is FCI?
questions.answer: FCI building is located near FOM building and DTC.

questions.question: Where is FCI Student Study Lounge?
questions.answer: FCI Student Study Lounge is located on the ground floor of the FCI building.

questions.question: Where is FOM?
questions.answer: FOM building is located near FCI building and DTC.

questions.question: Where is FAIE?
questions.answer: FAIE building is located infront of FCM building and beside STD building.

questions.question: Where is FCM?
questions.answer: FCM building is located infront of FAIE building

questions.question: Where is DTC?
questions.answer: Dewan Tun Canselor is located near FCI building and FOM building.
